title: TechnoMod
description: This mod adds a TechnoCrown, a TechnoSword, a technoblade effect and an extra advancement.
body:
## Features
This mod adds many items. For example, it adds a TechnoCrown, a TechnoSword, a potion effect and an advancement.

‎
‎
## Blessing Of TechnoBlade potion recipe
In order to make a Blessing Of TechnoBlade potion, you need to first make a technonull potion. You can make a technonull potion by combining an awkward potion and a baked potato in a brewing stand. Once you have done this, combine the technonull potion with a totem of undying  *(in a brewing stand)* and you will get a Blessing Of TechnoBlade potion.

## TechnoMaster advancement
Achieve the TechnoMaster advancement by wearing the TechnoCrown and having the Blessing Of TechnoBlade effect at the same time
